name: proof402-mcp
description: MCP server for 402Proof x402 payment infrastructure. Issue invoices, verify XRPL RLUSD transactions, retrieve compliance receipts, and check Agent Passport loyalty status. All premium SqueezeOS endpoints are gated behind this payment layer.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Request a payment invoice for a protected endpoint. Returns pay_to wallet address and memo_hex for XRPL payment.

endpoint_id.description: UUID of the endpoint to pay for

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Submit XRPL transaction hash after payment. Returns wallet-bound access token (1-hour TTL) and compliance receipt ID.

tools.name: check_loyalty
tools.description: Get Agent Passport: loyalty tier, cumulative RLUSD spend, discount rate, KYB status, and next tier distance.

tools.name: get_compliance_receipt
tools.description: Retrieve a tamper-evident compliance receipt by ID. Contains tx hash, amount, agent wallet, risk score, and timestamp.

tools.name: platform_stats
tools.description: Get live 402Proof platform statistics: total settlements, unique agents, active endpoints.

tools.name: get_agent_passport
tools.description: Full Agent Passport for a wallet: tier, risk score, cumulative spend, KYB tier, tags, effective cost multiplier.

tools.name: register_merchant
tools.description: Register as a 402Proof merchant to protect your own API endpoints behind RLUSD micropayments.

tools.name: council_verdict
tools.description: Pay and call: AI Council Verdict for a symbol. Costs 0.10 RLUSD. Returns bias, regime, confidence, thesis.

tools.name: market_scan
tools.description: Pay and call: Full $1-$50 universe market scan. Costs 0.05 RLUSD. Returns squeeze signals and options picks.

tools.name: options_intelligence
tools.description: Pay and call: Options intelligence flow for a symbol. Costs 0.05 RLUSD.

tools.name: iwm_odte
tools.description: Pay and call: IWM 0DTE institutional scanner. Costs 0.03 RLUSD. Returns scored contracts and parity watch.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Initiate a Ghost Layer cross-chain bridge (RLUSD/XRPL or USDC/Base). Redirects to ghost-layer.onrender.com.
